action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed immediately with TypeError: BCEWithLogitsLoss.forward() takes 3 positional arguments but 4 were given due to malformed loss call with ternary and extra arg after model forward succeeded. Best test EER remains 0.1181 (dev EER ~0.0004 after 5 epochs on wav2vec2-base + simple mean-pool + linear). Rapid loss drop to ~0.003 indicates severe overfitting to seen attacks A01-A06. Analysis: Loss bug is from fragile dim-handling code (old model returned shape that triggered conditional); root cause of poor test EER is insufficient backbone/head for OOD generalization (unseen A07-A19 attacks, telephony codecs, disjoint speakers). WavLM-large (317M params) + stats pooling (mean+std) + BN/ReLU/dropout MLP is standard for ASVspoof LA and fits <1B limit. Prior max_length=160k + bf16 + small bs prevented OOM. History confirms model.py is still old (768-dim linear head). Decision: Rewrite model.py (new architecture with get_pretrain_name), minimally edit train.py (fix loss to criterion(outputs, labels), ensure squeezed logits), run 8-epoch training then submit_eval for strong new baseline and updated time measurement.

command_output.stdout: Training completed. Best checkpoint saved at checkpoints/best.pt
